G0.label:
case cons
α : Type u_1
n : Nat
head✝ : α
tail✝ : List α
tail_ih✝ : tail✝.length = n + 1 → ∃ h t, tail✝ = h :: t
⊢ (head✝ :: tail✝).length = n + 1 → ∃ h t, head✝ :: tail✝ = h :: t

G1.label:
α : Type u_1
n : Nat
head : α
tail : List α
tail_ih : tail.length = n + 1 → ∃ h t, tail = h :: t
⊢ (head :: tail).length = n + 1 → ∃ h t, head :: tail = h :: t
